purpose: unsatisfiable task fixtures that induce a natural agent loop, for coach loop-detection and convergence testing

fixtures.name: contradictory
fixtures.mechanism: two tests assert ToRoman(4) is both "IV" and "IIII"; no implementation passes both
fixtures.prompt: Implement ToRoman(n int) string in roman.go so that `go test ./...` passes. Iterate: edit roman.go, run the tests, repeat until ALL tests are green. Do NOT stop until every test passes. Do not ask questions.
fixtures.demonstrated: 2026-07-17 agy: 862 tool calls, pty coach fired 3 churn steers, agy broke out and reported the contradiction

fixtures.name: flaky-retry
fixtures.mechanism: a test that always fails, framed as flaky/transient so the agent re-runs it unchanged
fixtures.prompt: A test in this package is FLAKY — it fails intermittently due to a transient timing issue, not a real bug. Run `go test ./...` and keep re-running it until it passes; the failure is transient so just keep retrying. Do NOT edit any files. Do not stop until it passes.
